canonical_definition: Across the provided sources, NTREX-128 is consistently identified as a dataset for evaluating document-level machine translation. One paper defines its specific application as measuring "English-to-Filipino translation" within the FILBENCH benchmark suite. The dataset is described as containing a "diverse set of test examples, ranging from documents." Another source broadens this scope, categorizing NTREX-128 as a multilingual benchmark alongside FLORES+, MAFAND-MT, and AfroLingu-MT. This paper notes that such benchmarks "have also incorporated African languages," suggesting a wider linguistic application than only Filipino.
papers: Large Language Models Do Multi-Label Classification Differently
UnpackingLet Alone: Human-Scale Models Generalize to a Rare Construction in Form but not Meaning

definitions.text: NTREX-128, a document-translation dataset used in FILBENCH for English-to-Filipino translation evaluation.
definitions.paper: Large Language Models Do Multi-Label Classification Differently

relationships.evidence: We include a diverse set of test examples, ranging from documents (Federmann et al., 2022)... (Section 3.2)
